{"id":"FLOW-7k9","title":"Phase 1: Convert prompt hooks to command hooks with fingerprints","description":"Convert the PreCompact and SessionStart:compact hooks from type 'prompt' to type 'command' with dynamic fingerprints to prevent LiteLLM caching.

Tasks:
1. Create plugins/flow/hooks/precompact-prompt.sh with fingerprint pattern
2. Create plugins/flow/hooks/postcompact-prompt.sh with fingerprint pattern  
3. Update plugins/flow/hooks/hooks.json to use command hooks instead of prompt hooks

The fingerprint pattern should follow verify-completion.sh style with NONCE, SESSION_ID, and timestamp.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"liangshihlin@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z","created_by":"Liang-Shih Lin","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z"}

{"id":"FLOW-bzs","title":"Phase 2.1: Update flow-state.sh for unified state management","description":"Extend flow-state.sh to manage all state in a single state.json file, eliminating separate prd-context.json and session.json files.

Tasks:
1. Add 'prd_context' subcommand with set/get/clear operations
2. Move session data into state.json under 'session' key
3. Update cmd_session init/clear/get to use state.json
4. Update cmd_init to include prd_context and session fields

This centralizes all state management and eliminates state fragmentation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"liangshihlin@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z","created_by":"Liang-Shih Lin","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z"}

{"id":"FLOW-8zj","title":"Phase 2.2: Update discover-prd-context.sh to use unified state","description":"Modify discover-prd-context.sh to write PRD context to state.json via flow-state.sh instead of creating a separate prd-context.json file.

Changes:
- Replace jq write to prd-context.json with call to flow-state.sh prd_context set
- Pass --branch, --prd_path, --worktree flags to the set command

Depends on Phase 2.1 being completed.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"liangshihlin@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z","created_by":"Liang-Shih Lin","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:20Z"}

{"id":"FLOW-3e2","title":"Phase 3: Update hook scripts for unified state references","description":"Update the newly created prompt hook scripts to reference the unified state system.

Tasks:
1. Update precompact-prompt.sh prompt text to reference unified state commands (flow-state.sh get, prd_context get, get session)
2. Update postcompact-prompt.sh prompt text to check session and team_state keys in state.json
3. Verify other hooks (check-pending-state.sh, persist-state.sh, verify-completion.sh) work correctly with unified state

This ensures all hooks use the centralized state management.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"liangshihlin@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:21Z","created_by":"Liang-Shih Lin","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:21Z"}

{"id":"FLOW-xuj","title":"Verification: Test hooks redesign end-to-end","description":"Comprehensive testing of the hooks redesign implementation.

Tests:
1. Fingerprint cache-busting - verify fingerprints change on each invocation
2. Unified state - test prd_context set/get operations
3. SessionStart hook - verify prd_context written to state.json (not separate file)
4. Session management - verify session data in state.json
5. End-to-end flow test - run /flow:plan and trigger compaction

This ensures the redesign works correctly and achieves the goals of preventing LiteLLM caching and eliminating state fragmentation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"liangshihlin@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:21Z","created_by":"Liang-Shih Lin","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:21Z"}
